sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42443" key="e)ri/qallos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρί-θαλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n42443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">growing luxuriantly, flourishing,</tr_> of plants and trees, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
